name: Addresses.com

steps: Open the PeopleConnect Suppression Center (this brand's opt-out page redirects there).
Enter your email address, agree to the terms, and submit.
Open the verification email and click the link to proceed.
Search for your listing, select it, and confirm the suppression.
If the form fails or you can't confirm a listing, email the prepared request to privacy@peopleconnect.us.

network.name: PeopleConnect Suppression Center
network.note: One suppression-center request covers every PeopleConnect site listed here.

notes: Addresses.com is a PeopleConnect brand: one suppression at suppression.peopleconnect.us covers all PeopleConnect people-search sites (Intelius, TruthFinder, Instant Checkmate, US Search, ZabaSearch, Addresses.com). Email-only entry, so the opt-out itself doesn't disclose your name history. Re-check periodically.
attribution: Derived from Big-Ass Data Broker Opt-Out List (CC BY-NC-SA); flow verified against the live PeopleConnect Suppression Center.
